title: taraxacum subalternilobum
intro: Taraxacum subalternilobum, also known as the lesser horseweed or lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Taraxacum subalternilobum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable addition to a healthy diet. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum subalternilobum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
